title: LEVERLOC Suction Shower Caddy Bathroom Basket Shelf Suction Shower Caddy Storage No Drilling Shampoo Holder Removable Powerful Bathroom for Shampoo Toiletries Kitchen Accessories，White
features: Warm Tips: The suction cups are only stick on smooth, non-porous surfaces like metal, glass, tile, stainless steel and acrylic but not apply to uneven tiles, texture plate, unfinished marble, wallpaper, painted wall, etc. Incorrect installation will cause the vacuum loss of suction cups. If problems when firstly installation, please wash the suction cup, dry it with hair dryer and test it on the smooth glass surface. If suction holds, that means initial wall might not applicable for using suction cup, please change installation location

Hassle-free Installation: Simply press down the suction cups with palm to squeeze the air out, they will stick to the wall firmly. You can finish the installation in 1 second, and put your items in the shelf immediately without waiting 24h. No screws, no nails, no glue needed. Damage-free to your wall. Shower caddies can be re-positioned many times and removed without leaving sticky marks and residue

Large Storage Capacity: Includes 2 Shower Baskets (Each measuring 27.43CM L x 9.4CM W x 19.05CM H) with 4 Suction Cups. 2 shower racks with fence hooks are perfect for Bathroom & Kitchen Storage, such as shampoos, conditioners, shower gels, facial cleansers, loofahs, kitchen tools, etc., anywhere you need. Shower caddy suction cups heavy duty help you save a lot of space

Durable Material & Strong Suction: Shower caddy baskets are made of premium thickened ABS material. Our suction cup based on the bionics octopus sucker principle is made of TPE material. Each suction shower shelf with 2 suction cups holds up to 10 KG. Shower caddy suction cup keeps stable and sturdy when showering. Please do not install the suction cups to the grout lines

Fast Draining Design: With 22 drainage holes and 6° inclined bottom design, maximizes the air ventilation and water dripping away. Keep your bath products clean and dry quickly. The shower shelves are removable and reusable. You can take them off for cleaning. Suitable for bathroom, washrooms, kitchens, college dorm rooms, even for desk organizer. Suction cup shower caddies are great for renters, travelers, and those who want a temporary shower storage solution

Yes, LEVERLOC suction cup of this shower caddy is removable and reusable. Does it require any tools to install? No, LEVERLOC shower caddy does not require any tools for installation.
